prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类/理科最低位次约 4985→12301→9188→16565→8451，波动剧烈；2022 年大幅后移后 2023 年有所回升，2024 年因新高考模式调整出现较大波动，2025 年基准约 8451 名；本省理科/物理类计划 2021 年 16 人、2022 年 15 人、2023 年 10 人、2024 年 12 人、2025 年 13 人；2026 年计划 14 人，较 2025 年小幅扩招约 7.7%，竞争略有缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜 2026 年约第 79 名，近年排名稳中有升（2021 年第 82 名→2026 年第 79 名）；2026 年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及学术不端与师德师风事件（考研名师田静学历造假争议），可能对报考热度产生一定抑制；抖音热度排名第 39（较热），短视频平台曝光度中等偏上；2023 年曾出现小语种专业录取位次下降的投档异常信号；外国语言文学 A+（全国顶尖），覆盖英语、德语、法语、西班牙语、日语、俄语等所有语言类专业，学科实力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 外语类专业 2024 年社会热度评估为「一般观望」，整体平稳偏冷；计算机/电子信息类等工科专业社会热度较高，但北外工科规模较小；本省 2026 年考生总数约 39.2 万人，较 2025 年（约 38 万）小幅增加，物理类考生估算约 26.4 万人，竞争略有加剧，与 2024 年基本持平；北京外国语大学位于北京，对广西考生属于跨省报考；该校在广西招生占比约 2.1%–2.4%（2025 年广西招生 13 人，占全国总计划约 2.17%），占比稳定，无明显地域偏好变化。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 8451、2026 年计划小幅扩招（位次后移约 390 名）、本省物理类考生小幅增加（竞争略加剧）、声誉偏负面（略微抑制热度）等因素，结合考生规模增加与声誉因素做有限修正，预测最低位次约 8871 名，区间 8371–9371 名。

- 英语（北京理工大学信息管理与系统专业联培）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）

- 信息管理与信息系统（商务智能）

major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间内建议以二档为主、一档冲刺、三档保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如 8300 名以内）可重点冲一档联合培养专业；位次接近区间上限（9300 名左右）建议以三档为主。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category/Science was approximately 4985→12301→9188→16565→8451, with drastic fluctuations; after a significant drop in 2022, it rebounded in 2023, experienced large fluctuations in 2024 due to the new Gaokao model adjustment, and the baseline in 2025 was about 8451; the provincial Science/Physics Category enrollment plan was 16 in 2021, 15 in 2022, 10 in 2023, 12 in 2024, and 13 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 14, a slight expansion of about 7.7% compared to 2025, easing competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; on the Soft Science main ranking, about 79th in 2026, with a stable upward trend in recent years (82nd in 2021→79th in 2026); the reputation evaluation in 2026 is somewhat negative, mainly involving academic misconduct and teacher ethics incidents (the controversy over the fake academic qualifications of the famous postgraduate entrance exam teacher Tian Jing), which may somewhat suppress application enthusiasm; Douyin popularity ranking 39th (relatively hot), with moderate to high exposure on short video platforms; in 2023, there was an abnormal signal of declining admission rankings for small language majors; Foreign Language and Literature A+ (top in the country), covering all language majors such as English, German, French, Spanish, Japanese, Russian, etc., with outstanding disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the social popularity of foreign language majors was assessed as 'generally wait-and-see,' overall stable but slightly cool; engineering majors such as Computer Science/Electronic Information have high social popularity, but BFSU's engineering scale is small; the total number of examinees in the province in 2026 is about 392,000, a slight increase from about 380,000 in 2025, with an estimated 264,000 Physics Category examinees, slightly intensifying competition, roughly the same as 2024; Beijing Foreign Studies University is located in Beijing, which is a cross-province application for Guangxi examinees; the university's enrollment proportion in Guangxi is about 2.1%–2.4% (13 Guangxi enrollments in 2025, accounting for about 2.17% of the national total plan), stable, with no obvious regional preference changes.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 8451, the slight expansion of the 2026 plan (ranking shifts back by about 390 places), the slight increase in provincial Physics Category examinees (slightly intensified competition), the somewhat negative reputation (slightly suppressing enthusiasm), and making limited corrections based on the increase in examinee numbers and reputation factors, the predicted minimum ranking is about 8871, with a range of 8371–9371.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2, use Tier 1 for a sprint, and Tier 3 as a safety; for rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 8300), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 joint training majors; for rankings close to the upper limit of the range (around 9300), it is recommended to focus on Tier 3.

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 1496、2026 年计划缩招约 11.5%（位次前移约 104 名）、本省历史类考生增加约 7.2%（竞争加剧，位次后移）、声誉偏负面（略微抑制热度）等因素，结合考生规模增加做有限修正，预测最低位次约 1412 名，区间 1158–1666 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 709 → 1428 → 1561 → 5526 → 1496. From 2021 to 2023, the ranking shifted backward year by year. In 2024, due to the new college entrance examination's major group division, there was a significant fluctuation (special major group ranking 5526). In 2025, it recovered to about 1496. The provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plan: 17 in 2021, 18 in 2022, 23 in 2023, 23 in 2024, 26 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 23, a reduction of about 11.5% compared to 2025, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking in 2026 approximately 79th, with stable or slightly rising rankings in recent years. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving academic misconduct and teacher ethics incidents, which may suppress application enthusiasm to some extent. Douyin popularity ranking 39th (relatively hot), short video platform exposure is moderately high. In 2023, there was an abnormal signal of declining admission rankings for minor language majors. Foreign Language and Literature A+ (top nationally), covering English, German, French, Spanish, Japanese, Russian, translation, and all other language majors, with outstanding disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the social popularity of foreign language majors was assessed as 'generally wait-and-see,' overall stable but slightly cool. Law, journalism, and communication majors show social popularity divergence. In 2026, the total number of examinees in the province is about 392,000, with history category examinees estimated at about 128,000, an increase of about 7.2% compared to 2025 (about 119,000), intensifying competition, roughly the same as 2024. Beijing Foreign Studies University is located in Beijing, which is a cross-province application for Guangxi examinees. The university's enrollment proportion in Guangxi is about 2.1%–2.4%, stable, with no obvious regional preference changes.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 1496, the 2026 enrollment reduction of about 11.5% (ranking moves forward about 104 places), the increase in provincial history category examinees by about 7.2% (intensified competition, ranking moves backward), and the negative reputation (slightly suppressing enthusiasm), with limited adjustments for the increase in examinee numbers, the predicted minimum ranking is about 1412, with a range of 1158–1666.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 1150), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 translation, joint training, and other flagship majors. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 1650), it is recommended to focus on Tier 3 law, Russian, etc.
